news.headline: PurposeEnergy launches $23M project using anaerobic digestion tech for Vermont's circular economy goals.
news.summary: A project in Salem, New Hampshire, led by PurposeEnergy is making strides in supporting Vermont's circular economy goals. With a budget of $23 million, the project is leveraging patented anaerobic digestion technology to achieve this objective.

news.headline: AbbVie and Gedeon Richter collaborate on developing new targets for treating neuropsychiatric conditions after 2-decade partnership.
news.summary: A recent collaboration between AbbVie and Gedeon Richter will focus on identifying and advancing new targets aimed at treating neuropsychiatric disorders. This discovery program is a result of their longstanding partnership of nearly 20 years. The companies aim to leverage their combined expertise to address the unmet medical needs in the field. The initiative will be based in North Chicago, Illinois, and Budapest, Hungary. The partnership, spanning almost two decades, highlights the commitment to advancing research in this area, potentially leading to groundbreaking solutions for patients with neuropsychiatric conditions.

news.headline: Energous wins IoT Innovation of the Year award for 2W PowerBridge transmitter system in Mobile Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Energous Corporation, known as Energous Wireless Power Solutions and trading under the symbol WATT on NASDAQ, has been recognized for its advancements in over-the-air wireless power networks (WPNs). The company's Energous 2W PowerBridge transmitter system has been named the winner of the "IoT Innovation of the Year" award. This prestigious award was bestowed by Mobile Breakthrough, a respected independent market intelligence organization. This honor was part of the 8th annual Mobile Breakthrough Awards program, which acknowledges outstanding companies and technologies in the industry. Energous Corporation continues to lead in innovative wireless power solutions, with their latest achievement being acknowledged for its excellence in the field of IoT with this significant award win.

news.headline: Propane buses promote safety during National School Bus Safety Week, providing a cleaner ride to school.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on October 24, 2024, amidst National School Bus Safety Week, school districts nationwide are prioritizing student safety. Propane-powered buses have emerged as a top preference for a secure, eco-friendly, and dependable transportation option to school. With their efficient performance and environmental benefits, these buses are gaining traction as a favored choice among school districts, showing a noticeable increase in adoption rates across the country.

news.headline: AuthenticID launches AuthenticID360, offering ID verification and risk signaling, with 2-second response time. A unified identity verification platform.
news.summary: In Seattle, a renowned firm called AuthenticID has recently launched AuthenticID360, an all-encompassing identity verification platform. This innovation boasts rapid 2-second response times for identity transactions and offers a combination of ID verification, biometric authentication, and KYC services. AuthenticID360 serves as a unified solution for comprehensive identity verification and risk scoring, emphasizing its robust verification and risk signaling features. This release marks a milestone for the company as it aims to offer top-tier solutions for global identity verification and fraud prevention, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Binance offers up to 10% APR for SOL stakers in its extended BNSOL campaign, meeting popular demand for increased rewards.
news.summary: Binance has decided to prolong the BNSOL APR Boost Campaign, enabling SOL stakers the opportunity to receive a maximum of 10% APR. This extension comes in response to significant interest from users and is intended to offer extra incentives for participants.

news.headline: GUNNAR debuts Kista Collection, blue light blocking glasses to protect eyes and elevate style, PRNewswire, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: A cutting-edge pair of digital lifestyle glasses has been unveiled, promising to shield your eyes from harmful blue light and enhance your daily appearance. Gunnar Optiks, the leading maker of high-quality computer eyewear, introduced the Kista model on Oct. 24th, 2024 in Carlsbad, California. This innovative product is designed to provide protection for your eyes while offering a stylish touch to your everyday look. With Gunnar's reputation for excellence in this field, the Kista glasses are expected to make a significant impact in the market.

news.headline: Cape partners with IT&E to provide 4G/5G connectivity on USS Abraham Lincoln 130 miles offshore, enhancing Navy's telecommunications capabilities.
news.summary: An update from privacy-focused mobile carrier Cape based in Arlington, Va., highlights advancements in providing cutting-edge telecommunications services to the Navy. Working alongside partner IT&E, Cape has made significant strides in enabling 4G/5G connectivity. This progress was demonstrated during trials conducted on the USS Abraham Lincoln, reaching distances of up to 130 miles offshore. By offering a reliable alternative for high-bandwidth data connections, Cape and IT&E, a key mobile technology provider in Guam and the Northern Mariana Islands, are successfully meeting the Navy's communication needs.

news.headline: New GOATUSDT perpetual contract on Binance Futures offers 75x leverage, starts on October 24, 2024.
news.summary: A new perpetual contract called GOATUSDT has been introduced by Binance Futures, providing traders with increased leverage up to 75x. This new trading option is set to go live on October 24, 2024, expanding the range of opportunities for users.

news.headline: US 4-Week Bill High Yield Actual 4.65% (Forecast -, Previous 4.700%)
US 4-Week Bill Auction
US 4-Week Bill Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.83 (Forecast -, Previous 2.900)
Pool Corporation (NASDAQ:POOL) reports Q3 earnings with $3.27 per share (missing estimates) and $1.43 billion in sales.
news.summary: Pool Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as POOL, saw an increase in its shares trading on Thursday following the release of its financial report for the third quarter of 2024. The company reported earnings of $3.27 per share, falling short of the predicted $3.29 per share. This marked a 7% decrease from the previous year. Quarterly sales stood at $1.43 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $1.40 billion. Pool Corp experienced a 3% decrease in sales compared to the same period last year which saw sales at $1.47 billion.

news.headline: Virtu Financial exceeds Q3 expectations with earnings of 82 cents per share, $706.84M revenue, $444M trading income surge.
news.summary: Shares of Virtu Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: VIRT) are seeing a decline in trading on Thursday following the company's third-quarter report. Their adjusted earnings per share for the quarter stood at 82 cents, surpassing the analyst consensus of 79 cents. Revenues for the quarter surged to $706.84 million, marking a 12.2% increase from the previous year. Their trading income, net, saw significant growth as well, rising by 40.5% to reach $444.0 million for the quarter, compared to $316.1 million in the same period last year. Adjusted net trading income also saw a notable increase, rising by 30.2% to $388.03 million.

news.headline: Laboratory Corp reports Q3 2024 EPS of $3.50 (up from $3.38), beating consensus of $3.49. Sales rise 7.4% to $3.28B. Adjusted operating income $441.1M, compared to $423.9M in Q3 2023.
news.summary: Laboratory Corp (NYSE:LH) announced third-quarter 2024 adjusted earnings per share at $3.50, a rise from $3.38 the previous year, surpassing the projected $3.49. Sales climbed 7.4% year-on-year to $3.28 billion, close to the estimated $3.26 billion. The growth stemmed from organic revenue of 4.2%, acquisitions net of divestitures of 3.1%, and a foreign currency translation of 0.1%. The uptick in organic revenue was propelled by a 4.8% rise in the organic Base Business, offset by a (0.6%) decrease in COVID-19 testing. Adjusted operating income for the quarter stood at $441.1 million or 13.4% of revenue, in contrast to $423.9 million or 13.9% in Q3 of 2023. The rise in numbers was highlighted by William Blair. Diagnostic giants Labcorp and Roche are set to increase testing capacity amidst global worries about a new MPOX strain. For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: VAYK aims for Q4 profitability, predicts big 2025 launch after steady revenue from first Airbnb operation in Atlanta.
news.summary: Vaycaychella, Inc. management announced on October 24, 2024, that the company, listed as VAYK on OTC Pink, has been experiencing consistent revenue from its initial Airbnb venture. The business is actively expanding its operations in the metro-Atlanta area, aiming to establish a stronger presence and achieve further growth.

news.headline: Inflation easing brings relief for Fed as big price hikes decline.
Bitcoin's Open Interest surpasses $40 billion, price nears $70K. Investors excited but watch out for potential volatility.
news.summary: Bitcoin's Open Interest spiked to $40.5 billion on Oct. 21, as reported by CoinGlass, indicating a significant moment in the crypto market. Open Interest, measuring the total value of active futures contracts, suggests heightened leverage and market interest. The price of Bitcoin was close to $70,000, sparking excitement among investors anticipating a potential breakout. However, increased Open Interest also hints at potential volatility and liquidation risks. This development highlights the complex dynamics at play in the crypto market and the need for cautious optimism among investors.

news.headline: Catchpoint recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Digital Experience Monitoring on October 24th.
news.summary: In the latest edition of the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring released on October 24th, Catchpoint has been recognized as a Leader. This reaffirms the importance of Digital Experience Monitoring (DEM) and Internet Performance Monitoring (IPM) as crucial investments for businesses to remain competitive. The report highlights the increasing industry recognition of the significance of DEM and IPM in today's digital landscape, where nearly every business operation and human engagement relies on optimal performance.

news.headline: New Relic named a Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring, positioned as "furthest in vision".
news.summary: Recently, New Relic, a leading Intelligent Observability Platform based in San Francisco, was recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring (DEM). The prestigious report evaluates DEM vendors on various metrics such as product capabilities, market understanding, innovation, and strategy. New Relic secured a spot in the Leaders quadrant and was highlighted as the front-runner in vision within the market. This acknowledgment solidifies New Relic's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Avangrid sold Kitty Hawk North offshore lease area to Dominion Energy for approx $160 million, $3,000 per acre.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., a sustainable energy company under the Iberdrola Group, has finalized the sale of the Kitty Hawk North offshore wind lease area to Dominion Energy. The deal, valued at about $160 million, involves the 40,000-acre lease with a payment of roughly $3,000 per acre. This sale encompasses the offshore wind lease area and its associated assets.

news.headline: Caravelle International Group terminates Ore Sourcing Agreement with CUEX Metal AG per announcement on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In its recent announcement on October 24, 2024, Caravelle International Group, a leading global ocean technology company traded on the Nasdaq under the symbol HTCO, revealed the end of its Ore Sourcing Agreement with CUEX Metal AG. This significant development comes after the agreement was first made public on the Company's website back in April.

news.headline: Cybersecurity expert MalwareJake Williams joins Hunter Strategy as VP of RND and Managing Director of Hunter Labs in 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Hunter Strategy, a prominent cybersecurity and technology consulting company, revealed the appointment of Jake Williams, a well-known cybersecurity expert, to its executive team. Williams has been welcomed as the Vice President of Research and Development as well as Managing...

news.headline: RBW EV Cars launches Spirit EV business, focusing on automotive electrification services. U.S. and UK's exclusive classic electric sports car maker.
news.summary: Spirit EV is a company based in London that focuses on designing, building, and integrating electric vehicles, specifically specializing in automotive electrification services. On October 24, 2024, RBW EV Cars, the sole manufacturer of hand-crafted British classic electric sports cars in the United States and the United Kingdom, shared their latest announcement.

news.headline: Kraken set to launch Ink blockchain for DeFi by early 2025, offering trading, lending, and borrowing sans intermediaries.
news.summary: Kraken has launched a new blockchain called Ink, aiming to streamline access to decentralized finance. The platform will provide trading, lending, and borrowing services without the need for intermediaries. This move is expected to revolutionize the DeFi sector by providing users with direct access to financial services without any middlemen. Ink aims to significantly decrease transaction costs and increase efficiency, making it easier for users to engage in DeFi activities. With its launch, Kraken is poised to make a significant impact on the DeFi landscape and attract a large number of users looking to leverage blockchain technology for financial services.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value targets $68,000 amid low US unemployment rates, making Fed rate cut less likely; BTC price rebounds from $65,000 dip.
news.summary: Bitcoin has surged thanks to a decrease in US jobless claims, putting the price of BTC at $65,000 in the rearview mirror.

news.headline: Decentralizing infrastructure with Web3 - Ep. 62 of Hashing It Out podcast discusses Fleek Network and Aethir with CEO and CTO.
news.summary: During the 62nd episode of the Hashing It Out podcast, Elisha Owusu Akyaw delves into Web3's effort to revolutionize internet infrastructure with Harrison Hines, CEO and co-founder of Fleek Network, and Kyle Okamoto, the Chief Technology Officer of Aethir.

news.headline: Solana outperforms Ethereum, reaching a new all-time high in price comparison.
news.summary: An increase in COVID-19 cases has been reported in the state of California, with over 5,000 new infections and 70 deaths recorded in the past week. This surge in cases has put additional strain on hospitals, with over 1,200 COVID-19 patients currently being treated. Despite efforts to vaccinate the population, health officials are concerned about the rise in cases and are urging residents to continue following safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing. The state government is also considering implementing new restrictions to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: RWA market faces a significant obstacle hindering its growth.
news.summary: According to recent data, the number of new COVID-19 cases in the country has spiked to over 10,000 daily, highlighting a concerning increase in infection rates. Health officials warn that hospitals are reaching capacity, with nearly 2,000 patients currently requiring intensive care. The total death toll has surpassed 1,500, with projections suggesting an even higher number in the coming weeks if the situation does not improve. Authorities are urging the public to strictly adhere to safety measures to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: FHLBank Pittsburgh reports Q3 financial results for 2024; details on 9-month ended Sept 30 also released.
news.summary: FHLBank Pittsburgh released unaudited financial results for the third quarter and nine months ending September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Consensys’s letter calls for clear crypto rules to maintain competitiveness in the US, protect consumers, and combat illicit activities.
news.summary: The message stressed the importance of well-defined regulations in the US to maintain competitiveness, protect consumers, and combat illicit activities. It highlighted the need for clear regulatory frameworks to achieve these goals effectively and preserve the country's position in the global market.

news.headline: Solana (SOL) price jumps 4% in 24 hours amid crypto market strength.
news.summary: Today, the price of Solana has risen by 4% over the last 24 hours, reflecting the overall strength of the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Hydromer, Inc. reported unaudited financial results for Q3 2024: $788,000 revenue (21% decrease YoY), $134,000 cost of goods sold (28% decrease YoY), $654,000 gross profit (19% decrease YoY).
news.summary: Hydromer, Inc. announced unaudited financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2024. The company reported a revenue of $788,000, a 21% decrease from the same period in 2023 when revenue was $993,000. Cost of Goods Sold was $134,000, a 28% decrease from $185,000 in 2023. Gross Profit for the quarter was $654,000, representing a 19% decrease. These results are subject to further auditing and potential adjustments. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Quantiphi's Codeaira, an AI agent, aims to boost developer productivity with over 200 tools and advanced code autocomplete.
news.summary: A digital engineering company, Quantiphi, based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, introduced Codeaira on October 24, 2024. Codeaira is a developer's agent powered by generative AI, equipped with over 200 utilities and advanced code autocomplete features. The tool aims to expedite coding processes and boost productivity.

news.headline: Viking Therapeutics unveils weight-loss quad, impacting Eli Lilly’s obesity triplet, raising stock. via Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Shares of Viking Therapeutics surged on Thursday following the company's unveiling of its weight-loss quadruplet, which poses a threat to Eli Lilly's experimental triple. The news has caught the attention of investors, with Viking Therapeutics stock rising significantly on the market. The juxtaposition between the two companies' weight-loss solutions is being closely watched as Viking Therapeutics' alternative gains momentum. Investors are eager to see how this development impacts both companies moving forward.

news.headline: Uber stock falls after Elon Musk announces Tesla's plan to launch ride-hailing service in CA and TX in 2022.
news.summary: Following remarks made by Elon Musk announcing Tesla's intention to introduce a ride-hailing service in California and Texas in the upcoming year, Uber’s stock experienced a decline. This news resurfaced concerns regarding competition from Tesla’s robotaxi service, causing an impact on Uber's stock value. The move from Tesla contributed to a drop in Uber’s stock price, signaling potential challenges for the company in the future.

news.headline: Amazon stock shows buy signal at July highs, analysts set targets for Q3 results due on Oct. 31.
news.summary: Amazon's stock price has recently consolidated for an extended period, establishing a buy point at the peak achieved in July. The company is set to release its Q3 financial results on October 31st. Analysts are estimating various target prices based on the upcoming Q3 report. This information raises the question of whether Amazon's stock is a recommended buy at the moment.

news.headline: Bitcoin hits over $67,000; miner initiates buy. Stay updated with latest cryptocurrency prices and news.
news.summary: Stay updated on the most recent cryptocurrency prices and developments. Bitcoin is currently trading above $67,000 with reports of a miner initiating a buy. For more information, visit Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile's stock soared after securing a HALO project contract. Partnered with SpaceX, it broke a downtrend.
news.summary: The stock of AST SpaceMobile experienced a significant surge, breaking out of a downward trend, following the announcement that the satellite manufacturer, known for its partnership with SpaceX, secured a contract for the HALO project. This development propelled the stock price upwards, indicating investor confidence in the company's future prospects. The partnership with SpaceX and the contract for the HALO project have been pivotal in driving AST SpaceMobile's recent success in the market.

news.headline: Shohei Ohtani's $4.4 million baseball deal may turn out to be a steal.
CryptoQuant CEO predicts Bitcoin will be mainstream currency by 2030 due to mining difficulty surge of 378% in 3 years.
news.summary: The CEO of CryptoQuant, Ki Young Ju, predicts that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could become a widely used currency by 2030, largely due to the increased adoption of stablecoins. Ju highlighted in a recent post that Bitcoin's mining difficulty has skyrocketed by 378% in the last three years. Initially, it was feasible to mine 50 BTC using just one PC in 2009; however, the current mining landscape is dominated by institutional-backed entities, making it extremely challenging for individual miners to participate. As institutional interest continues to rise, Ju anticipates a significant evolution in Bitcoin's... (The rest of the story can be found by visiting Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Cognizant ranked 10th on Newsweek's Most Reliable Companies list. Prestigious recognition for client reliability.
news.summary: Today in Teaneck, New Jersey, Cognizant has revealed their ranking as number 10 on Newsweek's list of America's Most Reliable Companies. This recognition acknowledges their commitment to delivering dependable services to clients. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CTSH. This accolade showcases Cognizant's dedication to ensuring reliability in their operations.

news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $264.5 mln.
Company reports lower sales and wider loss in Q3, plans to cut $65M in fixed costs by 2025. Sales $311.43M, down 16.6% YoY, adjusted EPS loss of 96 cents, EBITDA loss of $31.9M.
news.summary: Beyond, Inc. (NYSE:BYON) saw a decline in stock value following the release of its third-quarter 2024 earnings report. The company, which owns Overstock, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Zulily, disclosed sales of $311.43 million, marking a 16.6% decrease from the previous year and falling short of the projected $352.82 million. Additionally, Beyond reported an adjusted EPS loss of 96 cents, wider than the anticipated loss of 70 cents per share. Their adjusted EBITDA also suffered, with a loss of $31.9 million compared to $23.93 million in the prior year. These figures are in contrast to the positive news of a $40 million investment in Container Store stock. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Guardian study revealed benefits of adding genome sequencing to standard newborn screening, identifying 255 genetic conditions in diverse population.
news.summary: GeneDx, a company listed on Nasdaq with the symbol WGS, headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut, has released information regarding a study named GUARDIAN (Genomic Uniform-screening Against Rare Diseases In All Newborns). The study, published in JAMA (Journal of the American Medical Association), involves the largest research of its kind and focuses on utilizing whole genome sequencing (WGS) to detect 255 early onset genetic conditions in newborns. This study examines newborns from diverse backgrounds.

news.headline: Sonic Automotive's Q3 revenue missed at $3.491B (-4.2% YoY) and earnings per share at $1.26 (-38% YoY), but shares surged on dividend increase.
news.summary: Sonic Automotive, Inc. (NYSE: SAH) saw a notable increase in its stock value following the release of its third-quarter financial results and announcement of a 17% hike in its quarterly dividend. The company experienced a 4.2% decrease in total revenue compared to the previous year, reaching $3.491 billion instead of the anticipated $3.55 billion. Adjusted earnings per share were reported at $1.26, reflecting a decrease of 38% year-over-year, falling short of the estimated $1.43.Within the Franchised Dealerships segment, there was a 2% drop in same-store revenues and a 7% decline in same-store gross profit. Quarterly gross profit also saw a decrease of 7% year over year, amounting to $543.6 million. More details regarding the gross margin can be found on the full report accessible through Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Premium Guard Inc. will showcase expanded HD filter program at AAPEX 2024 in Memphis, with a new booth design.
news.summary: A company named Premium Guard Inc. (PGI) based in Memphis, Tennessee, recently revealed their involvement in the Automotive Aftermarket Products Expo (AAPEX) happening on October 24, 2024. The company, which can be found at www.premiumguard.com, is set to introduce a revamped booth at the expo to highlight its products more effectively.

news.headline: LICT Corp closes $100M financing with CoBank, extending facility to 2029 with improved covenant structure for growth.
news.summary: A company based in Rye, New York, known as LICT Corporation, recently announced the closing of a significant financial deal. The company, traded under OTC Pink as LICT, finalized a 5-year revolving credit facility worth $100 million with CoBank, ACB. This agreement extends the term of the facility until 2029 and doubles its size from $50 million to $100 million. Notably, the new loan structure offers enhanced covenants and increased flexibility for capital expenditures, aiming to improve services for communities and allow for potential growth opportunities through acquisitions.

news.headline: Three Pillars Capital, led by Gautam Goyal, acquires 308-unit Class-C multifamily property in Pasadena, TX.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Three Pillars Capital, headed by Gautam Goyal, revealed the purchase of The Life at Beverly Palms in Pasadena, TX. This Class-C multifamily property consists of 308 units. This acquisition marks a notable achievement for the company as it progresses in its ventures.

news.headline: Burundi plans to enhance power grid from 2025 with $1.4 billion investment.
